result: The data has been successfully cleaned and preprocessed. I loaded the seven specified longitudinal cohort survey datasets, merged them by the ID variable (NSID), and derived the requested time-varying economic activity variables. Specifically, I created collapsed 6-category variables for ages 17, 18, 19, 20, 25, and 32 (ecoact17, ecoact18, ecoact19, ecoact20, ecoact25, ecoact32) and detailed adult variables for ages 25 and 32 (ecoactadu25, ecoactadu32). All variables were harmonised according to the provided missing-value scheme and response category logic. The final output containing only the ID and these derived variables was saved to `data/output/cleaned_data.csv`.
